title: Integration with software for time and billing?
excerpt:
Would anyone know a Time and Billing system with rock solid integration with Monday.com? 
I see there is integration to Harvest. Is this limited? It seems on directional with no updates, etc.

posts.author: bllqnn (Bill Quinn)
posts.cookedHtml:
Would anyone know a Time and Billing system with rock solid integration with Monday.com?

I see there is integration to Harvest. Is this limited? It seems on directional with no updates, etc.

posts.author: emilyb (Emily Bisbach)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there!

The Harvest integration is a bit limited in regards to time tracking functions available, though we do offer a more robust integration with toggl. You can explore all of the available integrations in the Integration Center in your account, and if there is a platform you do not see an native integration available for, you can always check out Integromat or Zapier to create a custom integration! Lastly, I’d have a look at bill.it, available in the app center, which is an in-platform quote/billing app. I hope this helps!

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
